scripts.setup: npm install && cd app && npm install
scripts.start: tsx scripts/generate.ts && cd app && npm run dev
scripts.start:7d: tsx scripts/generate.ts --days 7 && cd app && npm run dev
scripts.start:30d: tsx scripts/generate.ts --days 30 && cd app && npm run dev
scripts.start:90d: tsx scripts/generate.ts --days 90 && cd app && npm run dev
